topic_text: When Sunset from Weather Underground, do Turn off using WeMo Smart Plug. At sunset, turn off the pool filter-chlorinator. Use WeMo rules or IFTTT Calendar Applets to turn the pump on and at sunset to turn it off Runs longer in summer and shorter in winter, which is good.
